<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tools/gen_spells.py from data/spells.json — do not hand-edit -->


Every Magery spell consumes one of each listed reagent per cast (unless the caster has Lower Reagent Cost or uses an arcane gem).

## Black Pearl

Associated with projection and force; common in energy and travel magic.

Used by 17 spells:

- [Fireball](/magic/circle-3/fireball/) (circle 3)
- [Fire Field](/magic/circle-4/fire-field/) (circle 4)
- [Mana Drain](/magic/circle-4/mana-drain/) (circle 4)
- [Recall](/magic/circle-4/recall/) (circle 4)
- [Blade Spirits](/magic/circle-5/blade-spirits/) (circle 5)
- [Dispel Field](/magic/circle-5/dispel-field/) (circle 5)
- [Mind Blast](/magic/circle-5/mind-blast/) (circle 5)
- [Poison Field](/magic/circle-5/poison-field/) (circle 5)
- [Energy Bolt](/magic/circle-6/energy-bolt/) (circle 6)
- [Mark](/magic/circle-6/mark/) (circle 6)
- [Paralyze Field](/magic/circle-6/paralyze-field/) (circle 6)
- [Chain Lightning](/magic/circle-7/chain-lightning/) (circle 7)
- [Energy Field](/magic/circle-7/energy-field/) (circle 7)
- [Gate Travel](/magic/circle-7/gate-travel/) (circle 7)

- [Mass Dispel](/magic/circle-7/mass-dispel/) (circle 7)
- [Energy Vortex](/magic/circle-8/energy-vortex/) (circle 8)
